model_catalog_sync_runs.reason: catalog sync runs are bounded operational history owned through catalog_source_id and reviewed before high-frequency retention work

model_change_logs.reason: model change logs are bounded audit history; data_model_id = null is limited to create failure, delete result, historical, or failed-before-parent rows

model_failover_queue_items.reason: failover queue items are a bounded queue-template child list with template-local ordering

model_provider_catalog_entries.reason: model provider catalog entries are a bounded catalog projection keyed by catalog source and upstream model

plugin_artifact_instances.reason: bounded plugin artifact projection is keyed by plugin installation and node without unbounded history

plugin_package_catalog_projection.reason: bounded plugin package catalog projection is one row per plugin installation and does not introduce unbounded expansion history

tenants.reason: tenant routing root reference uses tenant id as the root route key and must not invent workspace scope

users.reason: global user identity reference is shared by login and membership flows and is not routed by workspace scope

user_auth_identities.reason: global auth identity reference follows the login user identity and is not owned by workspace routing scope

workspaces.reason: workspace routing root uses workspaces.id as the workspace routing scope and should not duplicate scope_id

schema_migrations.reason: sqlx internal migration ledger, not application-managed user data
